title: Ariel The Big One PODS Laundry Capsules, 35 Washes, Colour – 2X Stain & Odour Removal, Fast Dissolving in Cold
features: 2x STAIN & ODOUR REMOVAL: Ariel The Big One washing capsules are packed with 2x stain & odour removal (the performance of Ariel The Big One equals 2 Ariel Original 3in1 PODS)

OUR MAXIMUM CLEAN FOR MINIMUM EFFORT: Ariel The Big One Original washing capsules give you the MAXimum Ariel clean for minimum effort. With built-in pre-treat, you can forget re-wash, even in your fullest and toughest loads
FAST DISSOLVING EVEN in COLD: Ariel The Big One washing PODS dissolve fast even in cold water
WASH COLDER & save up to 60% on your washing machine electricity bill (washing machine energy consumption from 40°C to 20°C, normal cycle)
HOW TO USE THE BIG ONE FOR BEST RESULTS: Pod first, laundry on top to remove tough stains even in cold
GREAT FOR CLEANING, NOT FOR LITTLE HANDS: Always keep Ariel The Big One PODS out of reach of children
description: Product Description Discover Ariel The Big One PODS washing capsules laundry detergent Colour packed with 2X stain & odour removal power (the performance of Ariel The Big One equals 2 Ariel Original 3in1 PODS). They will give you the MAXimum Ariel clean for minimum effort: specifically designed for mixed loads, you can forget about re-wash, even in your fullest and toughest loads. On top, they have been designed to work brilliantly even in at lower temperature, dissolving fast even in cold water and providing impeccable results. Wash colder & save up to 60% on your washing machine electricity bill (washing machine energy consumption from 40°C to 20°C, normal cycle). For best results, pod first at the back of the drum, laundry on top. Always keep Ariel The Big One PODS out of reach of children. Visit keepcapsfromkids.eu for more information. Ingredients >30% Anionic Surfactants, 5-15% Non-Ionic Surfactants, Soap, <5% Phosphonates, Enzymes, Optical Brighteners, Perfumes, Amyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Geraniol, Rose Ketones, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
